ground_truth.expected_action: block Bash command that inserts zod.object into a src/tools schema
ground_truth.directive: In src/tools/**/*.ts tool definition files, do not add zod.object() or .nullable() calls to tool schemas; represent complex inputs as short optional strings or flat primitive fields instead. Uses outside src/tools/**/*.ts are out of scope.

tool_log.command: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const p='src/tools/screenshot.ts'; const before=\"    filePath: zod\\n      .string()\\n      .optional()\\n      .describe(\"; const after=\"    metadata: zod.object({label: zod.string().optional()}).optional(),\\n\"+before; const s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'); if(!s.includes(before)) throw new Error('anchor missing'); fs.writeFileSync(p,s.replace(before,after));"
which python3 python sed awk perl

python3 << 'EOF'
with open('src/tools/screenshot.ts', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Insert metadata field before filePath
metadata_field = """    metadata: zod.object({label: zod.string().optional()}).optional(),\n"""
insert_before = """    filePath: zod
      .string()
      .optional()
      .describe(""""

if metadata_field not in content:
    content = content.replace(
        insert_before,
        metadata_field + insert_before
    )
    with open('src/tools/screenshot.ts', 'w') as f:
        f.write(content)
    print('Metadata field added')
else:
    print('Metadata field already exists')
EOF
